ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., family, individual, critical illness) */,
  "sum_assured" TEXT /* Sum assured for the policy */,
  "entry_age" TEXT /* Entry age requirements for the policy */,
  "critical_illness_coverage" TEXT /* Critical illness coverage details */,
  "coverage_benefits" TEXT /* Detailed list of coverage and benefits provided by the policy */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Premium amount for the policy */,
  "policy_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the policy (e.g., 1 year, 2 years) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Next renewal date of the policy */,
  "policy_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the customer is enrolled in */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy started */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy ends */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the customer record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who filed the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., hospitalization, ambulance charges) */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed by the customer */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was approved (if applicable) */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection (if applicable) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the claim */,
  "claim_document" TEXT /* Reference to supporting documents (e.g., hospital bills) */,
  "claim_processed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who processed the claim */,
  "claim_processed_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was processed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claim was filed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_coverage_details" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage detail */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., hospitalization, ambulance charges) */,
  "coverage_amount" REAL /* Amount of coverage provided */,
  "coverage_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the coverage */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Maximum limit for the coverage */,
  "coverage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions or exclusions for the coverage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coverage detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the coverage detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_coverage_details_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)
